case.title: HOLLYWOOD BASEBALL ASSOC. v. COMM'R INTERNAL REVENUE

opinion.h1: HOLLYWOOD BASEBALL ASSOC. v. COMM'R INTERNAL REVENUE, 383 U.S. 824 (1966)
opinion.h4: HOLLYWOOD BASEBALL ASSOCIATION v. COMMISSIONER OF INTERNAL REVENUE. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT. No. 957. Decided March 28, 1966.
opinion.p: Certiorari granted; 352 F.2d 350, vacated and remanded.
Solicitor General Marshall, Acting Assistant Attorney General Roberts and Harry Baum for respondent.

The petition for a writ of certiorari is granted. The judgment of the Court of Appeals is vacated and the case is remanded to that court for further consideration in light of Malat v. Riddell, ante, p. 569.
